prompt.description: Research task for the agent. Free-form text.

agent.description: Agent provider. 'codex' or 'claude-code' — defaults to 'codex' when Codex credentials are configured, otherwise 'claude-code'. The live MCP input schema constrains this to an enum of the providers whose credentials are configured (omitted when neither is).

model.description: Model for the agent. Provider-specific: claude-code uses 'opus', 'sonnet' (default), or 'haiku'; codex uses 'gpt-5.5' (default) or 'gpt-5.4-mini'. The live MCP input schema constrains this to the union of the configured providers' models.

preamble.description: Optional prose prepended verbatim to the generated agent context file (e.g. CLAUDE.md for claude-code) before the auto-generated environment section.

output_path.description: Optional. Where the agent should write its final artefact (e.g. /out/summary.md).

output_format.description: Optional. Expected shape/format of the output.

success_criteria.description: Optional. Checklist of conditions the output must satisfy.
